item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- New York Rangers – 69 pts (0.311) Tampa Bay Lightning – 98 pts (0.447) Carolina Hurricanes – 98 pts (0.447) Buffalo Sabres – 98 pts (0.441) Montreal Canadiens – 94 pts (0.429) Boston Bruins – 92 pts (0.414) Pittsburgh Penguins – 90 pts (0.405) New York Islanders – 89 pts (0.396) Columbus Blue Jackets – 88 pts (0.396) Ottawa Senators – 86 pts (0.393) Detroit Red Wings – 86 pts (0.393) Philadelphia Flyers – 86 pts (0.393) Washington Capitals – 83 pts (0.374) New Jersey Devils – 78 pts (0.356) Toronto Maple Leafs – 77 pts (0.342) Florida Panthers – 73 pts (0.333) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
